name: steam-profile-dashboard
description: Data visualization web app for Steam profiles.

scripts.postinstall: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../cloudflare-backend && npm install && cd ../backend && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: npm run dev:db && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.preview: npm run dev:db && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run preview:frontend"
